goal: Unlock the FE v6 Benchmark/AgentBench workflow by enabling benchmark job creation and wiring the desktop app to benchmark, benchmark-report, and model-run APIs without inventing benchmark evidence.
head: 24b3fdc
blocked_scope: DB migrations, worker/eval runner behavior changes, benchmark report methodology changes, and unrelated backend changes outside benchmark submit validation/queueing
Changing benchmark methodology, report schemas, M6 review docs, release readiness, training evidence policy, model catalog pins, or CUDA/MLX acceptance
Inventing benchmark numbers or treating mock/browser data as benchmark evidence
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Implementing package/export workflow screens in this phase
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may only add backend benchmark job request validation/queueing, generated OpenAPI/desktop DTO drift updates if needed, frontend API-client routes, desktop UI/model/mock/e2e coverage for the v6 Benchmark screen, plus LLM handoff docs, completion log, and PABCD contract.
required_commands: rg -n -- "projectBenchmark|listBenchmarks|getBenchmarkReport|Run benchmark|Benchmark job accepted|benchmark report|mock-only|AgentBench|Benchmark workflow" apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/main.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/m1_happy_path.test.mjs docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: Backend accepts type=benchmark project jobs when a frozen benchmark EvalSet, completed fine-tuned ModelRun, and required targets/seeds are present, and creates a queued Benchmark resource.
Desktop route parsing and workflow stepper expose /projects/{id}/benchmarks/new as the Benchmark workflow route.
Benchmark page uses submitProjectJob, listBenchmarks, getBenchmarkReport, and listModelRuns APIs and labels mock browser results as non-release evidence.
Browser happy path can build and approve a dataset, run Hardware Doctor, submit a training job, open Benchmark, submit a benchmark job, and see benchmark/report state from the mock API.
Docs continue to state that v0/M6 release remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "projectBenchmark|listBenchmarks|getBenchmarkReport|Run benchmark|Benchmark job accepted|benchmark report|mock-only|AgentBench|Benchmark workflow" apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/appModel.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.mjs apps/desktop/src/lib/apiClient.test.mjs apps/desktop/src/main.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/mockApi.mjs apps/desktop/e2e/m1_happy_path.test.mjs docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
warnings: This gate creates queued benchmark jobs and mock/browser benchmark states; it does not run the benchmark worker, produce accepted benchmark evidence, or create release evidence.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Use the canonical FE v6 AgentBench screen as the target, enable backend benchmark queueing for valid benchmark inputs, and connect the desktop page to benchmark/report APIs after a completed model run is available.
phase_notes.audit: The current backend rejects type=benchmark project jobs as MILESTONE_LOCKED and the desktop shell keeps Benchmark locked, so the v6 workflow cannot progress from model-run readiness to benchmark job creation or report review.
phase_notes.build: Add backend benchmark job validation/queueing, extend desktop route parsing/workflow readiness/API client, add Benchmark page rendering/action, update mock API and e2e happy path.
phase_notes.check: Run focused backend benchmark-submit tests, desktop model/API-client tests, browser happy path, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this Benchmark workflow unlock phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Unlock the FE v6 Benchmark workflow by enabling backend benchmark job queueing and desktop Benchmark route/API wiring; update focused tests/mock/docs/PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No DB migrations, no worker/eval runner changes, no release GO claim, no M6 review GO edits, no model/catalog/training/benchmark evidence policy changes, no downloaded weights/adapters/images/evidence bundles, no package/export UI implementation in this phase.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Use the canonical FE v6 AgentBench screen as the target, enable backend benchmark queueing for valid benchmark inputs, and connect the desktop page to benchmark/report APIs after a completed model run is available.
pabcd.audit: The current backend rejects type=benchmark project jobs as MILESTONE_LOCKED and the desktop shell keeps Benchmark locked, so the v6 workflow cannot progress from model-run readiness to benchmark job creation or report review.
pabcd.build: Add backend benchmark job validation/queueing, extend desktop route parsing/workflow readiness/API client, add Benchmark page rendering/action, update mock API and e2e happy path.
pabcd.check: Run focused backend benchmark-submit tests, desktop model/API-client tests, browser happy path, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
pabcd.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this Benchmark workflow unlock phase.
